narrative: Demolition + excavation site. Workers above height of 12 ft without fall protection on the east wall. Scaffold missing guardrails on north platform. Excavation deeper than 5 ft with no sloping or trench shield. No competent person designated for excavation. Energized work observed on a panel without an EEP. Missing LOTO before service of the conveyor. Hard hat not required per superintendent. Crane operation without signal person. Near miss with falling beam not reported. Toolbox talks skipped 3 days in a row. Silica cutting dry, no exposure controls. Confined space entry without permit or attendant.
